title: Front Office Manager - Wilderness Lodges India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Wilderness Lodges India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Wilderness Lodges India are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wilderness Lodges India:
Wilderness Lodges India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wilderness Lodges India!
